name: Modern Minimal
description: Design language cho các sản phẩm software hiện đại tinh giản - bao quát các phân khúc B2B SaaS mainstream, developer dark tools, enterprise Fortune 500, AI labs, consumer B2C apps, wellness/therapy apps, DTC physical products, Web3/crypto, và design-led extreme. Đặc trưng modern typography (humanist hoặc geometric sans, đôi khi editorial serif), palette đa dạng từ blue B2B kinh điển đến purple gradient Web3, density từ compact developer tools đến generous wellness apps, và corners từ sharp modernist đến pillowy consumer.

cleanProfessional._description: Phong cách B2B SaaS mainstream chuyên nghiệp - design language của Stripe, Linear, Notion, HubSpot, Asana, Slack. Mục tiêu: SMB/mid-market với business professional audience. Aesthetic: clean utility-product hiện đại, blue accent hoặc monochrome palette, humanist sans (Inter), minimal corners (4-6px), standard density (80-100px). Đây là DEFAULT cho Theme Modern Minimal khi không có signal đặc biệt.

blueAccent._description: Palette B2B SaaS kinh điển - white background sạch với slate text đậm và blue accent đáng tin cậy (Stripe-blue range). Convention được Stripe định nghĩa và adopt rộng rãi từ 2014, signal: B2B chuyên nghiệp, hiện đại, trustworthy nhưng không có enterprise gravitas.
blueAccent.color.primaryButton.label: #ffffff
blueAccent.color.secondaryButton.label: #0055ff
blueAccent.color.tertiaryButton.label: #0055ff
blueAccent.surfaces.dark.color.primaryButton.label: #ffffff
blueAccent.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #ffffff

monochrome._description: Palette monochrome B2B - không có color accent, chỉ grayscale với high contrast. Dành cho B2B brand muốn restraint hơn blue convention, signal: sophisticated, considered, mature B2B. Khác minimalistExtreme.pureMonochrome ở mức restraint - đây vẫn là mainstream B2B.

monochrome.color.tertiaryButton.label: #1a1a1a

monochrome.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #ffffff
monochrome.color.secondaryButton.label: #1a1a1a

warmNeutral._description: Palette warm B2B - cream background nhẹ với warm dark text, signal: human B2B, accessible-luxury, Notion-style warm. Khác aiNative.warmCreamEditorial (AI lab) hoặc dtcLifestyle.warmCreamEditorial (retail) - đây là B2B SaaS với warmth touch.
warmNeutral.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #ffffff

humanistSans._description: Humanist sans typography (Inter, IBM Plex Sans, Söhne với humanist warmth). Đặc trưng B2B SaaS mainstream - approachable và readable cho business audience. Default cho cleanProfessional.

geometricSans._description: Geometric sans typography (GT Walsheim, Söhne) - dành cho B2B SaaS muốn polished hơn humanist. Cooler tone, more designed feel.

regular._description: Regular weight (400) - lighter than medium, dành cho developer tool readability hoặc AI lab editorial reading.

medium._description: Medium weight (500) - default mainstream B2B/consumer. Cân bằng presence và readability.

semibold._description: Semibold weight (600) - dành cho stronger brand presence. Heavier than medium, dùng khi cần emphasis.

compact._description: Compact density (60-80px section padding) - developer dashboards, crypto trading interface. Information-dense nhưng vẫn readable.

standard._description: Standard density (80-100px section padding) - mainstream B2B SaaS default. Cân bằng information density và breathing room.

spacious._description: Spacious density (100-130px) - AI lab editorial feel, DTC retail photography, hoặc premium B2B. Breathing room cho long-form reading.

minimal._description: Minimal corners (4-6px border-radius) - default cleanProfessional, AI lab editorial. Tinh tế modern không quá sharp cũng không pillowy.

standard._description: Standard corners (8-10px border-radius) - softer rounded mà vẫn professional. Dành cho B2C consumer-leaning brand.

pillowy._description: Pillowy corners (12-20px border-radius) - SIGNATURE consumer-friendly. Approachable + warm + friendly. Wellness và consumer apps.

developerDark._description: Phong cách developer dark mode - design language của Vercel, Linear (early era), Sentry, Cursor, Raycast, Warp. **Inherits cleanProfessional structure** - giữ humanist/geometric sans foundation và overall layout principles từ B2B SaaS base, nhưng pivot 4 axes cho developer audience: palette flip sang dark mode primary (terminal/syntax/CRT/warm-dev), density compact (60-80px) cho data-heavy interfaces, corners sharp (0-2px) cho modernist precision, typography mặc định geometric sans (Geist) với monospace option cho technical UI. Vẫn có thể truy cập light-mode palettes của base personality cho marketing site contexts.

blueAccent._description: Palette B2B SaaS kinh điển - white background sạch với slate text đậm và blue accent đáng tin cậy (Stripe-blue range). Convention được Stripe định nghĩa và adopt rộng rãi từ 2014, signal: B2B chuyên nghiệp, hiện đại, trustworthy nhưng không có enterprise gravitas.

humanistSans._description: Humanist sans (Inter, IBM Plex Sans) - inherited từ base personality. Dành cho developer tool muốn human touch, friendly DX context.

geometricSans._description: Geometric sans typography (Geist - Vercel's typeface). Default developer aesthetic. Geometric signal precision + technical + modern.

monoDisplay._description: Monospace typography cho developer tool all-mono interface - JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Mono. Monospace headings tạo extreme terminal aesthetic.

regular._description: Regular weight (400) - lighter than medium, dành cho developer tool readability hoặc AI lab editorial reading.

medium._description: Medium weight (500) - default mainstream B2B/consumer. Cân bằng presence và readability.

spacious._description: Spacious density (100-130px) - AI lab editorial feel, DTC retail photography, hoặc premium B2B. Breathing room cho long-form reading.

ultraCompact._description: Ultra compact density (40-60px section padding) - dành cho developer tool data-heavy: observability dashboards, log streaming, code interface. Maximum information density.

standard._description: Standard corners (8-10px border-radius) - softer rounded mà vẫn professional. Dành cho B2C consumer-leaning brand.

sharp._description: Sharp corners (0-2px border-radius) - modernist precision. Đặc trưng developerDark, enterprisePremium, minimalistExtreme. Sharp edges signal: technical/institutional/design-led modernism.

enterprisePremium._description: Phong cách enterprise Fortune 500 - design language của Snowflake, Databricks, Palantir, Workday, ServiceNow. **Inherits cleanProfessional structure** - giữ professional B2B foundation và typography sans-serif principles, nhưng elevate cho institutional buyer (CIO/CISO/CFO). Bốn axes thay đổi: palette nghiêng về navy slate hoặc institutional dark thay vì bright B2B blue, typography premium geometric (Söhne/GT America) với editorial serif option cho gravitas, density có ultra option cho premium feel, corners sharp signal institutional modernism. Vẫn có thể access base personality palettes khi cần SMB-friendly tone.

institutionalGeometric._description: Institutional geometric typography truyền thống - IBM Plex Sans, Helvetica Now. Dành cho enterprise traditional như IBM, Oracle. Conservative institutional.

aiNative._description: Phong cách AI lab/foundation model - design language của Anthropic, OpenAI, Cohere, Mistral, Perplexity. Distinctive: warm cream editorial palette với editorial body serif (Tiempos/GT Sectra) - Anthropic-style intellectual gravitas, HOẶC precision dark palette với geometric sans - OpenAI-style capability positioning. Spacious density cho long-form research reading. Khác AI feature trong B2B SaaS - đây là AI-native product với 'AI as product' positioning.

warmCreamEditorial._description: Palette warm cream signature AI lab (Anthropic-style) - cream background ấm với slate text đậm và burnt amber accent. Signal: intellectual + safety positioning + editorial gravitas. Khác heritage.ivoryChampagne (Theme 01 multi-generational) và dtcLifestyle.warmCreamEditorial (DTC retail) ở context.

consumerFriendly._description: Phong cách B2C consumer mobile-first - design language của Cash App, Robinhood, Duolingo, Venmo, Spotify, Apple consumer apps. Aesthetic: warm + approachable + vibrant palettes (warm coral, sage mint, sunset peach, consumer blue), pillowy rounded corners (12-20px), humanist typography cho friendliness, generous density cho mobile-friendly touch UX. Target: individual users, mass-market mobile audience.

regular._description: Regular weight (400) - lighter than medium, dành cho developer tool readability hoặc AI lab editorial reading.

medium._description: Medium weight (500) - default mainstream B2B/consumer. Cân bằng presence và readability.

semibold._description: Semibold weight (600) - dành cho stronger brand presence. Heavier than medium, dùng khi cần emphasis.

standard._description: Standard density (80-100px section padding) - mainstream B2B SaaS default. Cân bằng information density và breathing room.

spacious._description: Spacious density (100-130px) - AI lab editorial feel, DTC retail photography, hoặc premium B2B. Breathing room cho long-form reading.

generous._description: Generous density (120-160px) - consumer apps mobile-touch friendly, design-led, wellness therapeutic. Lots of breathing room.

standard._description: Standard corners (8-10px border-radius) - softer rounded mà vẫn professional. Dành cho B2C consumer-leaning brand.

pillFull._description: Pill-full corners (24px+ border-radius) - playful extreme rounded. Dành cho consumer playful hoặc wellness extreme comfort.

wellnessTherapeutic._description: Phong cách wellness/therapy app - design language của Calm, Headspace, BetterHelp, Oura, Whoop. **Inherits consumerFriendly structure** - giữ humanist typography và pillowy corners foundation cho consumer-friendliness, nhưng pivot 4 axes cho therapeutic context. Palette dùng MUTED therapeutic tones (calming sage, soft lavender, warm sand, deep dreamy) - critical distinction: muted không vibrant như base personality. Typography weight light (300) cho calm reading, density spacious/generous/expansive cho breathing room. Vẫn có thể access vibrant consumer palettes từ base khi cần.

humanistSans._description: Humanist sans (Inter, IBM Plex Sans, system fonts). Default consumer - humanist signal approachability + friendliness cho B2C audience.

premiumHumanist._description: Premium humanist cho consumer cao cấp - Apple SF Pro style, GT Walsheim. Polished consumer cho designer-led consumer brand.

regular._description: Regular weight (400) - lighter than medium, dành cho developer tool readability hoặc AI lab editorial reading.

medium._description: Medium weight (500) - default mainstream B2B/consumer. Cân bằng presence và readability.

semibold._description: Semibold weight (600) - dành cho stronger brand presence. Heavier than medium, dùng khi cần emphasis.

light._description: Light weight (300) - signal restraint + premium + considered. Đặc trưng minimalistExtreme và wellness apps. Khác mainstream B2B (medium 500).

standard._description: Standard density (80-100px section padding) - mainstream B2B SaaS default. Cân bằng information density và breathing room.

spacious._description: Spacious density (100-130px) - AI lab editorial feel, DTC retail photography, hoặc premium B2B. Breathing room cho long-form reading.

generous._description: Generous density (120-160px) - consumer apps mobile-touch friendly, design-led, wellness therapeutic. Lots of breathing room.

expansive._description: Expansive density (180px+) - maximum design discipline. Wellness expansive calm, design-led extreme. Mỗi element như exhibit riêng.

standard._description: Standard corners (8-10px border-radius) - softer rounded mà vẫn professional. Dành cho B2C consumer-leaning brand.

pillowy._description: Pillowy corners (12-20px border-radius) - SIGNATURE consumer-friendly. Approachable + warm + friendly. Wellness và consumer apps.

pillFull._description: Pill-full corners (24px+ border-radius) - playful extreme rounded. Dành cho consumer playful hoặc wellness extreme comfort.

dtcLifestyle._description: Phong cách DTC physical product - design language của Allbirds, Glossier, Aesop, Casper, Brooklinen, Warby Parker. Distinctive: warm cream editorial (Aesop-style) HOẶC natural sage earthy (Patagonia-style) HOẶC dusty pink (Glossier-style). Editorial body serif option cho premium accessible feel. Critical differentiator: PHYSICAL product focus (không phải app/software/service). Mission-driven/sustainable positioning.

minimalistExtreme._description: Phong cách design-led extreme - design language của Linear (early era), Arc Browser, Stripe Press, Are.na, Things 3, Bear notes. Distinctive: pure monochrome palette (không color accent) HOẶC warm paper Stripe Press-style cho design-led publishing, premium humanist typography (Söhne) cho design-discipline, light type weight (300) cho restraint, sharp 0px corners cho modernist precision, generous/expansive density cho design breathing room. Design-as-positioning - typography và spacing là competitive advantage.

pureMonochrome._description: Palette pure monochrome SIGNATURE design-led extreme - Linear (early era), Arc Browser, Things 3. Không có color accent, pure black/white/grays. Mức restraint cao nhất - color = compromise. Khác cleanProfessional.monochrome (vẫn mainstream B2B).
